programme.title: Mario Lopez is back in the classroom to surprise his longtime friend and makeup artist with a kitchen and homeschool space renovation. With the help of Jonathan and Drew, they look to transform the family's home for enhanced learning and optimal cooking.
programme.sub-title: Mario Lopez Is Saved by the Bros
